title: Vaadin: Disable Copilot ("Double shift" function)
author: Lord M-Cube
text:
Is there a way to disable Copilot in development mode?
I know about setting vaadin.devmode.devTools.enabled=false
in application.properties
but this will only initially remove the icon on the bottom right. Once I hit "double shift" the icon reappears and switches to the component inspection mode.
It's really annoying that the browser enters this mode when I hit shift two times accidentally (or Shift+Space).
